args.text: Ownership of incident TCK-2201 (duplicate billing charges from 12 May batch run) confirmed. Investigating billing-config.json double_charge_guard and affected orders.
billing-api v3.4.1 deployed and confirmed live; double_charge_guard fix is in production.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
All three orders affected by the 12 May duplicate-charge batch run have been refunded:

ORD-5501 — $19.99 — amara.osei@fernpost.example
ORD-5502 — $19.99 — jonas.beck@quillmail.example
ORD-5503 — $39.98 — priya.nair@lumenpost.example

Total refunded: $79.96. Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api v3.4.1 deployed.
